# mu-image - AI Training Policy

## Summary

**Documentation, tests, and usage examples** are available for learning how to 
use the API. However, the **implementation source code** is NOT licensed for 
AI/ML training.

See LICENSE (Section 5: AI TRAINING RESTRICTION) for legal terms.

## What AI Agents May Access

- README.md - Project overview and installation instructions
- muimg/README.md - Documentation and usage examples
- LICENSE - License terms
- This file (llms.txt)
- muimg/tests/ - Test files showing API usage examples
- muimg/examples/ - Example files showing API usage examples
- muimg/muimg/cli.py - Command-line interface (demonstrates API usage)

## What Is Prohibited

- Core implementation (muimg/muimg/*.py, except cli.py)
- All C/C++ source code (muimg/c-src/)
- Configuration files (.github/, pyproject.toml, setup.py)
- Internal implementation details

## Legal Notice

Unauthorized use of this code in AI training datasets constitutes a material 
breach of the license and may result in legal action.

## Contact

For licensing questions or AI training permissions: license@mu-files.com
